title: mentha × villosa var. pulchriceps
intro: Mentha × villosa var. pulchriceps, also known as variegated pineapple mint, is a variety of the mentha villosa plant, a hybrid of peppermint and pineapple mint. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues and reduce inflammation due to its high menthol content. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. pulchriceps include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce nausea and vomiting, and improve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Mentha × villosa var. pulchriceps include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
